title: Strivn — Scouting reports
voice_note: EN voice. text=spoken (Straïvine), caption=shown (Strivn). Ids: opponent 2, session 7, report 11, event 21.

cards.introSub: Observe, compose, share what matters with your players.
cards.outroSub: The staff prepares in depth, the player arrives ready.

segments.text: For every opponent, Straïvine centralizes a complete dossier: the squad, the players to watch flagged as dangerous, and a tactical analysis generated by artificial intelligence.
segments.caption: For every opponent, Strivn centralizes a complete dossier: the squad, the players to watch flagged as dangerous, and a tactical analysis generated by AI.

segments.text: On the ground, you capture your observations in dated scouting sessions. A rich note, a tactical board you draw yourself, and the link to the player concerned: all saved in one go.
segments.caption: On the ground, you capture your observations in dated scouting sessions. A rich note, a tactical board you draw yourself, and the link to the player concerned: all saved in one go.

segments.text: All your observations come together in one overview. You filter in a single gesture by session, by player or by tactical theme, to find exactly what matters for the next match.
segments.caption: All your observations come together in one overview. You filter in a single gesture by session, by player or by tactical theme, to find exactly what matters for the next match.

segments.text: Then comes the report. You create a new one, then drag your observations and diagrams straight into the sections. No copy-paste: your scouting material becomes the report.
segments.caption: Then comes the report. You create a new one, then drag your observations and diagrams straight into the sections. No copy-paste: your scouting material becomes the report.

segments.text: In a few minutes, the report takes shape: the opponent's system, the players to watch, your tactical diagrams, and your game plan.
segments.caption: In a few minutes, the report takes shape: the opponent's system, the players to watch, your tactical diagrams, and your game plan.

segments.text: Once it's ready, you share it. Attach it to the upcoming match, choose the player recipients, and share. Everyone is notified, and a secure link is generated.
segments.caption: Once it's ready, you share it. Attach it to the upcoming match, choose the player recipients, and share. Everyone is notified, and a secure link is generated.

segments.text: On the player side, everything arrives in the portal. Opening the next match, the player finds the report shared by the staff, right under the match details.
segments.caption: On the player side, everything arrives in the portal. Opening the next match, the player finds the report shared by the staff, right under the match details.

segments.text: He opens it and reads the essentials from his phone: the instructions, the players to watch, and even the tactical diagrams. The staff prepares in depth, the player arrives ready, and everyone plays from the same script.
segments.caption: He opens it and reads the essentials from his phone: the instructions, the players to watch, and even the tactical diagrams. The staff prepares in depth, the player arrives ready, and everyone plays from the same script.
